model.purpose: project the top 100 players for the upcoming basketball season
model.newcomerBlend: 100% projection score (there should be somewhat of a learning/adjustment curve for freshmen)
notes: Never convert missing historical data to zero.
Blank means unavailable or not applicable; zero means an actual lowest possible score.
Freshmen and international newcomers do not receive historical BBPR.
Historical metrics always represent the prior season.
Team, class, role and projection information always represent the upcoming season.
Transfers retain historical metrics from their previous school.
Player classification controls which Talent Score formula is used.
Raw source data must be preserved separately from calculated data.
Percentiles must exclude blanks, text, N/A and errors.
Ambiguous players must be classified as Manual Review; do not guess.
Model weights should eventually be stored as configuration values rather than hardcoded repeatedly.
Player names should ultimately be supplemented with unique internal IDs and alias matching.
Rankings sort descending by Projected BBPR.
Confidence is informational and does not currently change Projected BBPR.
Projection Notes should explain the primary assumption driving a player’s rating.
